title: knautia sylvatica
intro: Knautia sylvatica, also known as the blue sage or woodland knautia, is a perennial plant in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Knautia sylvatica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Knautia sylvatica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
